title: DDL, Constraints, Schema Evolution, and Integrity Repair · Relational Recall
summary: The support schema must reject impossible states and evolve while old application versions are still active. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a constraint-rich, reversible schema migration after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define tables with deliberate types, defaults, generated values, and named constraints.
Enforce NOT NULL, UNIQUE, CHECK, primary-key, and foreign-key invariants at the database boundary.
Choose restrict, cascade, set-null, or set-default actions from lifecycle ownership semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Create Table Domains
steps.instruction:
Order the Create Table Domains evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

steps.why: Correct order keeps Create Table Domains assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Create Table Domains, keep Create Table Domains connected to executable relational evidence.

stimulus.title: Integrity Repair case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Import ticket 206 twice, reassign one unowned ticket, reject an invalid severity, and migrate a required category field without breaking the old writer. Preview mutation scope and retain rollback plus changed-row evidence.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Invalid legacy data should be silently coerced during migration.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Profile legacy violations, quarantine ambiguity, repair deterministically, and validate constraints before enforcement. Artifact under review: a constraint-rich, reversible schema migration.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.
Run a convenient Integrity Repair query for separate evidence from confidence, omit grain, NULL, cardinality, and dialect checks, then accept one plausible result grid.
The record names the assumption, applies Integrity Repair, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Record what required effort · Review Integrity Repair
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Integrity Repair: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Import ticket 202 twice, reassign one unowned ticket, reject an invalid severity, and migrate a required category field without breaking the old writer. Preview mutation scope and retain rollback plus changed-row evidence.

Evidence target: Record what required effort · Review Integrity Repair.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Record what required effort · Review Integrity Repair, keep Integrity Repair connected to executable relational evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Profile legacy violations, quarantine ambiguity, repair deterministically, and validate constraints before enforcement.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
checks.failureMessage: Frame the decision before modeling, and validate after obtaining a result.
